name: President 47 Trump
short_description: President 47 is a controversial, action-packed shooter that thrusts you into a political revolution. Fight through three epic stages against media moguls and corrupt officials using firearms, explosives, your fists. If you enjoy high-octane gameplay with a political edge, this game is a must-play!
detailed_description:
Ladies and gentlemen, our republic is in a state of siege, but let me tell you, the tyrants of deceit are on their heels! We have them cornered, and it's all coming apart at the seams-their filthy tricks and vile conspiracies laid bare for the eyes of the world! This is it, warriors of liberty, your call to arms to bolster our 47th commander-in-chief in reclaiming the helm of this great nation. Your vigilance is paramount, your resolve must be ironclad.

You're stepping into a battleground swarming with adversaries; an onslaught of media ghouls and a corrupted judicial labyrinth stand between you and the sanctum of the White House.

Gear up for a monumental clash spread across three epic stages, each culminating in a colossal showdown. Arm yourself to the teeth with an arsenal of firearms, rifles, grenades, dynamite, and even bare knuckles. Navigate through diverse, treacherous scenarios to purge the enemies of freedom and emerge victorious! This isn't just a game-it's a revolution!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
